promptSuffix: rounded chunky cartoon style, soft pastel palette (pink #FF6B9D, yellow #FFD166, green #06D6A0, sky blue #4CC9F0), friendly mascot when applicable, simple shapes, no text, no faces of real people, age-appropriate for 5-10 year olds, plain or simple background, cheerful and encouraging mood
negativePromptSuffix: no scary content, no realistic violence, no adult themes, no text overlays, no photographic style, no copyrighted characters, no harsh shadows, no dark moody palette
